sentences.sentence: Microphones hang above the front desk.
sentences.phonetic_focus: clear word-final consonants (desk); compound noun stress (front desk)

sentences.sentence: Headphones rest beside each chair.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-nes, -st); clear word-final consonant (chair)

sentences.sentence: Your scripts are printed automatically before each segment.
sentences.structure: passive voice with adverbial, direct address
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (scr-, -pts, -nted); reduced syllable (automatically)

sentences.sentence: The broadcast controls are mounted along the studio wall.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-dcast, -ntrols, -lts); compound noun stress (broadcast controls)

sentences.sentence: We can record your interview segments inside the soundproof booth.
sentences.structure: declarative with prepositional phrase, direct address
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-rd, -nts, -ndpr-); compound noun stress (soundproof booth)

sentences.sentence: Music playlists are updated every Wednesday afternoon.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-sts, -ted); reduced syllables (Wednesday, afternoon)

sentences.sentence: If you experience any trouble during your show, check the schedule taped beside the control board.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linked speech across clause boundary (if you_experience); reduced function words in rapid sequence (during your, beside the); stress-timing across 16 words

sentences.sentence: Towels are stacked near the entrance.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-cked, -nce); clear word-final consonants

sentences.sentence: Lockers line the far wall.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant cluster (-ckers); clear word-final consonant (wall)

sentences.sentence: Please shower before you swim.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant cluster (sh-, sw-); basic vowel distinction (shower/swim)

sentences.sentence: Kickboards are kept in the bins by the shallow end.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-ckb-, -pt); compound noun stress (kickboards, shallow end)

sentences.sentence: The deep lanes are reserved for our morning lap swimmers.
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced function words in rapid sequence (for our); compound noun stress (lap swimmers)

sentences.sentence: Water temperature is adjusted automatically throughout the afternoon.
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced syllables (temperature, automatically, afternoon); cluster (-ghout)

sentences.sentence: If you are unsure which lane to use, check the chart posted beside the lifeguard station.
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced function words in rapid sequence (which lane to use, beside the); stress-timing across 16 words

sentences.sentence: First, stretch your paper flat.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (str-, -tch); clear word-final consonants (flat)

sentences.sentence: Next, dampen the surface with a wide brush.
sentences.phonetic_focus: linking between words (with_a); consonant clusters (-mp, br-); reduced syllable (dampen)

sentences.sentence: Then, float a pale wash across the sky area.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (fl-, -sh); compound noun stress (sky area); linking (across_the)

sentences.sentence: Drop richer pigments into the corners while everything stays wet.
sentences.phonetic_focus: final consonant clusters at phrase boundaries (-nts in); linking (into_the)

sentences.sentence: Lift extra water from the edges with a thirsty brush.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-ft, -dges, br-); linking (water_from); reduced syllable (thirsty)

sentences.sentence: Soften the harsh outlines with a few gentle strokes.
sentences.phonetic_focus: consonant clusters (-ften, -rsh, str-, -kes); reduced syllable (gentle)

sentences.sentence: Lastly, set your finished painting on the shelf so the layers dry evenly overnight.
sentences.structure: fronted Lastly clause + result clause finish
sentences.phonetic_focus: reduced function words in rapid sequence (on the, so the); final consonant clusters at phrase boundaries (-shed, -lf); reduced syllables (evenly, overnight)
